texto: Wehehehehell, if it isn’t Ollie-Ollie-oxidant-free..."You can take…all the tea in China…put it in a big brown…bag for me.He’s as sweet as tupelo honey; he’s an angel of the first degree.Men with insight…men in granite…knights in armor bent on…chivalry.He’s as sweet as…tupelo honey; just like honey, baby…from the bee."=> For those who read and liked "When Irish eyes are sparkling"Can i have a musician here?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom Collins: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Wehehehehell, if it isn’t Ollie-Ollie-oxidant-free..."You can take…all the tea in China…put it in…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, funny, honey pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: A real hero doesn't expect to be thanked or even recognized.
